sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82197" key="perissotru/fhtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περισσο-τρύφητος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῠ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n82197.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">over-luxurious</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὀϊζύς</foreign> Timo <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0086.tlg025.perseus-grc1:3:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.3</biblScope> </bibl> (nisi leg. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πᾶσ᾽ ἀπερισσοτρύφητος</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
